name: analyzeStreams
description: Analyze all Kinesis Data Streams in the current region. Collects 7 days of CloudWatch metrics, computes throughput patterns, throttling rates, and cost comparisons across all three pricing modes. Returns per-stream recommendations (provisioned vs on-demand) and an account-level On-demand Advantage assessment.

name: generateReport
description: Analyze all Kinesis Data Streams and store a full optimization report (HTML + JSON) in S3. Use this for scheduled reporting or when you want a persistent, shareable report.

bucket_name.description: S3 bucket name to store the report. If not provided, uses the default configured bucket.

name: getStreamDetails
description: Get detailed CloudWatch metrics, EFO consumers, usage patterns, and a capacity mode recommendation for a single named Kinesis Data Stream.

stream_name.description: The name of the Kinesis Data Stream to analyze
